negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: physics_125
prompt: The video opens with a close-up view of a single, large, marquise-cut diamond, the central focus throughout the sequence. The diamond is held securely by a metal prong, allowing it to rotate slowly against a plain, light gray background. In the first frame, the diamond is positioned at an angle where its facets are catching the light, creating a mesmerizing display of reflections and refractions. The diamond's surface is smooth and polished, with a gradient of colors ranging from clear to a subtle pinkish hue, adding depth and visual interest. The lighting is soft yet sufficient to highlight the diamond's brilliance and clarity. The scene is devoid of any other objects or characters, ensuring that all attention remains on the diamond itself. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a consistent angle that emphasizes the intricate cut and the play of light across its surface. As the video progresses, the diamond continues to rotate slowly, showcasing different angles and facets, further highlighting its brilliance and the interplay of light and color. By the final frame, the diamond has completed part of a rotation, presenting a full view of its intricate cut and the captivating display of reflections and refractions, maintaining the elegance and allure of the gemstone as the sole subject of the viewer's focus.
